message_evidence.content_excerpt: Hi! I'd like to book a one-way flight from ORD to PHL on May 26. I want to book the exact same flight I took recently on May 10 from ORD to PHL. Can you help me with that?

Thanks for confirming the details. I actually don't need any travel insurance. Also, I want to add an extra passenger, Kevin Smith, born April 12, 2001. I don't have any checked baggage for this booking. I want to pay using only one of my travel certificates. Please make sure the seats are economy, aisle and middle seats together. And just to confirm, this is a one-way ticket only.

I understand. Please proceed with booking just for myself on the one-way flight from ORD to PHL on May 26 in economy class, no travel insurance, and no checked baggage. Use one of my travel certificates for payment. Let me know the price before finalizing.
I will now search for available economy class flights from ORD to PHL on May 26 to find the options and prices for you.
Please book the same flight number HAT271 as my previous trip on May 10.
Please use certificate_8045380 with $500 for the payment. All the details are correct. Please go ahead and proceed with the booking.
Hi! I'd like to book a one-way flight from ORD to PHL on May 26. I want to book the exact same flight I took recently on May 10 from ORD to PHL. Can you help me with that?

I want to book the one-way flight on May 26 in economy class for myself and one extra passenger, Kevin Smith, born April 12, 2001. I don't need any checked baggage or travel insurance. I want aisle and middle seats together. I will pay using one of my travel certificates only. Please proceed with that.
All the details are correct. Please use the $500 travel certificate for payment. Go ahead with the booking.
Error: Payment amount does not add up, total price is 348, but paid 320
I only want to pay using one of my travel certificates. If the price is above $500, please drop the second passenger and book only for me.
Yes, please proceed with booking the one-way flight for just me using the $500 travel certificate. Thank you. ###STOP###
